name: EH Consolidated Reporting — Weekly Funnel + Closed Deals

nodes.name: Weekly Monday 6AM EST
nodes.notes: Fires every Monday at 6 AM. Make sure the n8n instance timezone is set to America/New_York (EST). This gives the team a full weekly report before the Monday standup.

nodes.name: GHL Get Won Opportunities
nodes.notes: Pulls all won opportunities from the NetRev Sales pipeline. After import, create an HTTP Header Auth credential named 'GHL PIT Auth' with Name='Authorization' and Value='Bearer pit-b2ba1c69-a1c1-4d20-b317-f641083541cf'. The Version header is required by GHL API v2.

nodes.name: GHL Get Discovery Call Bookings
nodes.notes: Gets last 7 days of Discovery Call bookings from the 'Experiential Hospitality Discovery Call' round-robin calendar (SZOeo5oHq54xrIVBAq0P). Used for funnel metrics: booked vs showed.

nodes.name: GHL Get Setter Calendar Events
nodes.notes: Gets last 7 days of Setter Calendar bookings (fJ7agmQoMMwLAJL53RrW). Used to track setter-booked calls separately from organic discovery calls.

nodes.name: Filter Won Opps to Last 7 Days
nodes.notes: Filters won opportunities to only those closed in the last 7 days. Extracts contactId for each so we can pull attribution data. Handles both API response shapes (opportunities or data array).

nodes.name: Has Won Opps?
nodes.notes: Only proceeds to contact lookup if there are won opportunities this week. If zero closes, we skip the contact enrichment branch and the Closed Deals sheet write.

nodes.name: Split Contact Requests
nodes.notes: Splits the array of won opportunity contacts into individual items so we can loop through the GHL contact endpoint for each one.

nodes.name: GHL Get Contact Details
nodes.notes: Fetches full contact record for each won opportunity. Batched at 5 requests per second to respect GHL rate limits. We need the contact's attributions array (UTM data), tags, and dateAdded for the attribution report.

nodes.name: Build Attribution Records
nodes.notes: For each won deal, extracts: contact name, email, revenue (monetaryValue), DCT number from UTM medium, close date, webinar date from tags. Identifies TFM-attributed deals by checking for fb_ad/facebookads UTM source or 'Feed Media' in campaign name. This is the attribution chain: Contact → attributions[] → utmMedium contains DCT number.

nodes.name: Calculate Funnel Metrics
nodes.notes: Aggregates all GHL data into weekly funnel metrics: Discovery calls booked/showed/no-show, Setter calls booked/showed, Closes, Revenue, Show rate, Close rate. Meta spend/registrations are placeholder zeros — they get populated once the Pipeboard Meta Ads node is connected (or you can manually enter them). ROAS = revenue / spend.

parameters.name: time_range
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({since: new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString().split('T')[0], until: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}) }}

nodes.name: Meta Ads Get Weekly Insights
nodes.notes: Pulls last 7 days of campaign-level insights from Meta for the active EH campaign (120233091829250773 = 'The Feed Media Leads Campaign Webinar - Copy'). After import, create an HTTP Header Auth credential named 'Meta Ads Token' with Name='Authorization' and Value='Bearer <your_meta_access_token>'. Alternatively, you can replace this node with a Pipeboard MCP call if preferred.

nodes.name: Merge Meta + GHL Funnel Data
nodes.notes: Merges Meta Ads performance data (spend, registrations, CPL, impressions, clicks) with GHL funnel data (calls, closes, revenue). Recalculates ROAS with real spend. Also computes booking rate (calls booked / registrations) and CTR.

nodes.name: GSheets Append Closed Deals
nodes.notes: Appends each closed deal as a row to the 'Closed Deals' tab. Columns: Close Date, Contact Name, Email, Revenue, DCT Number, TFM Attributed (boolean), UTM Source/Medium/Campaign, Webinar Tag, Tags, Contact Date Added, Opportunity ID, Contact ID. Replace '13NUfiz-VB_LFNJWW9tJFELkGV9E4W05Q7lEgpgOwNVg' with actual spreadsheet ID after creating the Google Sheet. Create a tab named 'Closed Deals' with these column headers in Row 1.

nodes.name: GSheets Update Weekly Funnel
nodes.notes: Appends one row per week to the 'Weekly Funnel' tab. Full funnel view: Meta (spend, registrations, CPL, impressions, clicks, CTR) → GHL (discovery calls booked/showed/no-show, setter calls booked/showed) → Closes (count, revenue, close rate, ROAS). Replace '13NUfiz-VB_LFNJWW9tJFELkGV9E4W05Q7lEgpgOwNVg' with actual spreadsheet ID. Create a tab named 'Weekly Funnel' with these column headers in Row 1.

nodes.name: Slack Post Weekly Summary
nodes.notes: Posts the weekly consolidated report to #internal-experientialhospitality (C08Q8MBH0U9). Includes Meta performance (spend, registrations, CPL, CTR), GHL funnel (calls booked, showed, show rate), and close metrics (count, revenue, ROAS). Set your Slack OAuth credential after import.

nodes.name: Error Alert to Slack
nodes.notes: If any node in the workflow fails, posts an error alert to #internal-experientialhospitality. Common failures: GHL token expired (PIT tokens last ~1 year), Meta token expired, Google Sheets permission issue, GHL rate limit.

main.node: Filter Won Opps to Last 7 Days
